suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the scrutiny review/validator procedure so Task-spawned `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` subagents can run with automatic execution approval in this worker environment, or explicitly document the manual-review fallback.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In this discover-scan re-run, the Task invocation for `fix-discover-recursive-scan-and-cache` again exited immediately with `Exec ended early: insufficient permission to proceed`, so the validator had to perform the fix review manually after checking the feature transcript skeleton, handoff artifact, commit diff, and current source.
